title: Wool Pressure Plates
description: Adds silent pressure plates made of wool.
body:
### Functionality
Wool Pressure Plates adds pressure plates made out of every available colored wool. These new pressure plates act the same way as wooden pressure plates. They will give off a redstone signal when walked on, and when an item falls onto them. They will not make a sound when being pressed, but you can change that behavior in the config. When placed, pressed, unpressed, or broken they do not trigger sculk sensors which can also be changed in the config.\
Additionally, they will negate a very tiny amount of fall damage.

![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/OP8q18B.png)

### Recipe
You can craft the plates with any wooden pressure plate and any color wool you like (shapeless).

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/FNlse7f.png)

If you like Wool Pressure Plates, why not check out [Wool Buttons](https://modrinth.com/mod/wool-buttons)?

You are allowed to use this mod in any modpack.
